Our Foundations

Built on the Living Word

01 ✝

Prophetic Voice

We carry the authentic prophetic mantle — speaking the heart of the Father into every generation with precision, love, and holy boldness.

02 🔥

Dead-Raising Grace

The same Spirit that raised Christ from the dead dwells in us. We are commissioned to manifest His resurrection power in every sphere of life.

03 👑

Glory Embassy

As ambassadors of the Kingdom, we steward the weight of Heaven's glory — releasing transformation wherever we are sent as His representatives on earth.

04 🕊️

Spirit-Led Community

A company of consecrated believers walking in deep covenant — iron sharpening iron, building each other into the full stature of Christ.

24/7 In Prayer
Who We Are

An Embassy
of Heaven

JDRGPE is not merely a ministry — it is a holy mandate. We are a prophetic embassy stationed on the earth, representing the Kingdom of Heaven with excellence and authority. Our name bears our calling: Jesus is at the centre, Dead-Raisers carry His resurrection power, Graced by the Father's unmerited love, Glory is our atmosphere, and Prophetic is our language.


We exist to train, activate, and release a generation of believers who walk in signs, wonders, and supernatural love — transforming nations, cities, and families from the inside out.

"Attending JDRGPE transformed how I walk with God. I came broken and left with a prophetic fire I never imagined. The weight of Glory in this embassy is unlike anything I have experienced."

— Sister Amara K., Glory School Alumni
Overseer JDRGPE Embassy
Leadership

Samuel Konadu

✝   Jesus, Dead-Raisers Graced Glory Prophetic Embassy

Called and commissioned by the Lord Jesus Christ, our Overseer carries a rare prophetic mantle marked by the fire of the Holy Spirit and a heart surrendered wholly to the Father's will. Under his leadership, JDRGPE has become a holy embassy — a place where Heaven's agenda is declared, the dead are raised in spirit and truth, and the glory of God is manifested without measure.

His ministry is anchored in the Word, fuelled by prayer, and demonstrated in power — walking in the fullness of the Great Commission with signs and wonders following.

"Heal the sick, raise the dead, cleanse those who have leprosy, drive out demons.
Freely you have received; freely give." — Matthew 10:8
